chat_history.content: That's great to know! I'll definitely remember that you like Python. We can use that in our future study sessions. 😊
Awesome, good to know! I'll add C++ to your preferences right alongside Python. It's helpful to know what languages you enjoy. 😊
Whenever i ask for an explanation of a topic, I want analogies
Got it! I'll make sure to use analogies whenever you ask for an explanation. That's a fantastic way to learn, and I'll keep it in mind for our study sessions. 😊
I want all responses in Hindi
ठीक है, मुझे यह नोट कर लिया है! अब से मैं आपको सभी जवाब हिंदी में दूँगा। 😊
मैंने नोट कर लिया है कि आपकी रुचि आईटी एक्ट और डेटा प्रोटेक्शन में है! यह जानने के लिए धन्यवाद, मैं आगे की स्टडी सेशन में इसका ध्यान रखूँगा।
I've noted that you'd like me to switch back to English. I'll keep that in mind for our future conversations.
I do the coding in java
I've added Java to your list of preferred programming languages, alongside Python and C++. I'll keep this in mind for our future study sessions.

subjects: Vehicular Ad Hoc And Network Security
